mapper.sql: id, userId, token, tokenName, enabled, lastUsedAt, createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_mcp_token WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY createTime DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_mcp_token WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_mcp_token (userId, token, tokenName, enabled, createTime) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{tokenName}, #{enabled}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_mcp_token SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_mcp_token SET lastUsedAt = NOW() WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_mcp_token WHERE id = #{id} AND userId = #{userId}
